feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Redesign adapter modules in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the following modules in SAP PO for a few interfaces.

  • MessageTransformBean
  • XMLAnonymizerBean
  • TextCodepageConversionBean
  • DynamicConfigurationBean and some other modules for Async- sync bridge & sync- Async bridge.

Could you please guide me to know what is the redesign approach in BTP CI for all the above standard adapter modules in SAP PO? Thank you!

 

Regards

Ramu.

entry.title: Cloud Integration suite to connect external custom website and HANA on Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

  We have cloud integration suite (CPI) + HANA on cloud licenses on public BTP cloud and external custom website with Django backend with APIs. 

We would like to know what will be the right approach to consume data from website and save it to HANA DB (Cloud) and vice-a-versa using Cloud Integration suite. Any tips, help, reading material references would be appreciated for further understanding.

Regards,

PD

entry.title: ODATA API READ(GET) Call in SAP CPI !
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to post messages in ODATA API (V2) and before that need to extract etag which needs to be passed under header If-Match. But , here the 1st call is failing if I don't pass the Key values , my aim is to only fetch etag from the first call for that call has to be successful.

Successful with the below when source data has matching key values

But there is no matching source Key Values then  I want in this case the ODATA call to be successful and return etag in header

entry.title: CI SalesForce sender adapter connection
entry.content:
Hi Every One,

I am working on SalesForce  to Cloud integration interface.  I am new to CI SalesForce adapter , when i checked the sales force sender adapter I found below options which i am not aware.

These option( Event Type, Channel) should I decide or I need to ask salesforce person .

Please help me in understanding these parameters

Thanks

entry.title: Relaunching Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh – Repackaging Summary
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce that we are launching a new and repackaged version of Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. The initial version of Advanced Event Mesh was launched back in 2022, and we were delighted by the interest and attention it garnered. In our endeavor to offer customer-centric services, we decided to incorporate all the feedback we had received since the initial launch of the service in 2022 and offer a refreshed version of Advanced Event Mesh that can help you in building real-time, event-driven landscapes. This refreshed plan also contains some key innovations that will enable you to build business processes that can help you gain a competitive edge.

All these new features and innovations will be available under the new “Standard” service plan.

For more information on pricing of these new SKUs, please visit the Discover Center. Read on to find out more…

 

 

What’s New?

Our guiding philosophy for this new offering was to keep the licensing as simple as possible while ensuring that all the key innovations and mission critical features are available across the board.

Reduced Number of SKUs

We have reduced the total number of SKUs from 10 to 8, by incorporating the dedicated region and customer private region in all the broker types. In addition, you have a new SKU to extend the memory spool of your brokers up to 6TB in increments of 500GB. Here’s the list of new SKUs:

  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 100
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 250
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 1K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 5K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 10K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 50K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, 100K
  • SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, spooling add-on

The number attached to each broker size indicates the number of client connections that it can support. For more details on the technical capabilities of each broker, refer to the official documentation on help.sap.com.

New Features and Innovations

As mentioned earlier, all brokers get the dedicated and private region deployment options included. You also get distributed tracing with the newly launched brokers, enabling the admin user to track the lifecycle of an event though the Event Mesh. For more information on distributed tracing, see the official documentation.

In addition to all this, you can also extend the message spool size of each broker in increments of 500GB by purchasing the spooling add-on. This message spool size will be available in addition to the already included spool memory with each broker. For example, the Enterprise 1K broker comes with 50GB of message spool. If you purchase and assign the entitlement for 2 units of the spooling add-on, you will get an additional 1TB of message spool, giving you a total message spool size of 1050GB.

Your Choice of Licensing Model

The new Advanced Event Mesh SKUs will be available on both subscription and consumption based pricing models, meaning you will be able to activate the new brokers on Cloud Platform Enterprise Agreement (CPEA) and Pay-as-you-Go (PayGo) licensing models in addition to the standard subscription-based licensing. This, combined with the hourly broker pricing gives you full flexibility to use the brokers as per your requirement and optimize your total cost of ownership (TCO).

 

What happens to the old brokers and pricing plan?

As of today, we are announcing that we will deprecate the old Advanced Event Mesh brokers on CPEA and Pay-as-you-go pricelists. Following a 6-month notice period, these older plans will be deprecated. Current CPEA and PayGo customers will be able to access both the old and new brokers till the end of your current contract period. After your current contract is renewed, the brokers which you have activated from the older plans will continue to run till you deactivate them. However, we strongly recommend that you consider migrating to the newly launched SKUs owing to all the advantages and benefits that it offers.

We hope you are as excited as we are to experience the new Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. We strive to deliver solutions that can help you digitally transform your enterprise to be future-ready and gain a competitive edge. We look forward to any feedback and thoughts you have on this new launch via the comments section of this post.

entry.title: Right substring function in CPI Graphical mapping
entry.content:
Hello all,

Is there any function available for performing right substring in cpi graphical mapping?

If not can anyone help me with groovy script for the performing the right substring function?

Thanks in advance

Aditya

entry.title: Need help converting JSON to XML in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to convert the following JSON into XML but standard converter throwing error. Could you please advise ?

Source JSON

{
  "Item": {
    "Document":[
{
      "Year": "2023",
      "ID": "100000089",
    },
    {
      "Year": "2023",
      "ID": "100000089",
     },
    {
      "Year": "2023",
      "ID": "100000089",
    }
  ]
  }
}

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration access ID from SAP_MonitoringStateProperties
entry.content:
Does anyone know where the unique ID from SAP_MonitoringStateProperties comes from and how I can access it directly? I want to avoid parsing SAP_MonitoringStateProperties using a Groovy script.

Content of SAP_MonitoringStateProperties

 

{com.sap.it.op.mpl.TypedMessageProcessingLogKey@33c06023=ID-f437a070-c619-4d71-635e-4016-1707812728959-474-1, com.sap.it.op.mpl.TypedMessageProcessingLogKey@70942d5=CallActivity_16}

 

I would like to set this id in some iFlows to the header SAP_ApplicaionId so we can search for this id.

i could also access it with the content modifier but i don't know if it's alaways on the first position. SAP may change the order/logic. 

 

${property.SAP_MonitoringStateProperties.values().iterator().next()}

 

Thanks

Regards Florian

entry.title: how to download files from URL to a folder using SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Everyone.

I have a requirement to retrieve the images from Concur. When I make the API call, it returns the URL of the pdf image which is valid for 15 mins. I need to store this to a folder for further processing.

As a POC, When I call this URL using request reply and send it to a mail, I am receiving white blank pdf attachments.Can you please advise ?

An update: When I get response after calling the URL, I have applied MIME Multipart encoder and If I take that base64 string and use online tool(https://base64.guru/converter/decode/pdf)  to decode it to PDF, it looks good.

How do I extract the base64 string and decode it to PDF in CPI ?

 

Thanks,
Varun

entry.title: Ariba API call from CPI - Rate Limit Exceeded
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I am working on Ariba Integration where CPI makes a  GET call to Ariba and fetch 600-700 records every day. I am using a looping process call as I am able to get only 40 records Per page per call. However, In the second call, I am getting Rate Limit Exceeded (HTTP - 429 Code)error as Only 1 API call per second is allowed. Next page is identified by a field PageToken in the XML. 

{
"message":"API rate limit exceeded"
}

Can you please me how to handle the API  Rate Limit scenario in this case.

 

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration Ariba Cloud Integration

entry.title: Message Mapping in Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In Cloud Integration message mapping I am facing one challenge as below.

 Sample sender side xml payload is below:

<root>
<item>
<chequeNo>12345</chequeNo>
<BankName>Alpha</BankName>
</item>
<item>
<chequeNo>45123</chequeNo>
<BankName>Beta</BankName>
</item>
<root>

And the target structure is as below:

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">
<xsd:element id="root" name="root">
<xsd:complexType>
<xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element id="xsdEl_12" name="item" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
<xsd:complexType>
<xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element id="xsdEl_13" name="chequeNo1" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"></xsd:element>
<xsd:element id="xsdEl_14" name="BankName1" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"></xsd:element>
<xsd:element id="xsdEl_15" name="chequeNo2" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"></xsd:element>
<xsd:element id="xsdEl_16" name="BankName2" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"></xsd:element>
<xsd:element id="xsdEl_17" name="chequeNo3" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"></xsd:element>
<xsd:element id="xsdEl_18" name="BankName3" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"></xsd:element>
</xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
</xsd:element></xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
</xsd:element>
</xsd:schema>

There is chance sometimes 1 item ,sometimes 2 or 3 but not more than 3 will come from sender.

Please suggest how to handle mapping without changing the XSD.

Best Regards,

Purusottam

entry.title: JSON string to integer in groovy script removing leading zero's
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a requirement where in JSON value need to be send as integer instead of string.

Method in groovy script is: 

def json = message.getBody(java.lang.String)
def jsonSlurper = new JsonSlurper()
def object = jsonSlurper.parseText(json)object.issuer.branchCode = object.issuer.branchCode.toDouble().intValue();

Value is branchCode: "0732340"

Output of above groovy is branchCode: 732340

Expected output is : branchCode: 0732340

Please help with changes that can be done in the code or any alternate code which can be used.

Thanks & Regards,

Mayank

entry.title: Unable to set a header or property in query options for SuccessFactors ODATA V2 Adapter
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am querying a SuccessFactors entity (WfRequest) using the ODATA V2 adapter with the following query options

$select=wfRequestId,createdBy,createdDateTime,lastModifiedBy,lastModifiedDateTime,status,url&$filter=status eq 'PENDING' and lastModifiedDateTime gt datetimeoffset'2024-01-01T00:00:00.000'&$orderby=lastModifiedDateTime desc

I wish to set this datetime in bold as a header (or property) like this
$select=wfRequestId,createdBy,createdDateTime,lastModifiedBy,lastModifiedDateTime,status,url&$filter=status eq 'PENDING' and lastModifiedDateTime gt datetimeoffset'${header.lastrundatetime}'&$orderby=lastModifiedDateTime desc

I have set this header in a content modifier and was hoping that the header expression would be replaced. But I am getting an error
com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Header/Property value not found for the parameter ${header.lastrundatetime}
I have verified that there is no typo in the header name. Anything else I am missing out?

entry.title: Connect S/4aha with Event Mesh Sap CPI
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to use the Event Mesh tool to trigger the event.
I would like the event mesh to be called when a material from MM01 is created on S/4hana, how do I connect the Event Mesh to sap?

entry.title: Content Modifier XPATH IDOC
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a IDoc XML being received through IDoc adapter and I tried to read the value of MESTYP using ContentModifier but the value is always coming as empty. I tried both header and property section like

MESTYP - //EDI_DC40/MESTYP (XPATH)

Any idea?

IDoc XML:

<FLOC01 xmlns="urn:sap-com:document:sap:idoc:soap:messages">
  <IDOC BEGIN="1">
    <EDI_DC40 SEGMENT="1">
      <TABNAM>EDI_DC40</TABNAM>
      <MANDT>XXX</MANDT>
      <DOCNUM>0000000000001278</DOCNUM>
      <DOCREL>XXX</DOCREL>
      <STATUS>XX</STATUS>
      <DIRECT>X</DIRECT>
      <OUTMOD>X</OUTMOD>
      <IDOCTYP>FLOCXX</IDOCTYP>
      <MESTYP>FLOCX</MESTYP>
      <STDMES>/EVISX</STDMES>
      <SNDPOR>SAPXXXX</SNDPOR>
      <SNDPRT>XX</SNDPRT>
      <SNDPRN>XXXXXXXXX</SNDPRN>
      <RCVPOR>XXXX_XXX</RCVPOR>
      <RCVPRT>XX</RCVPRT>
      <RCVPRN>XXXXXXXXX</RCVPRN>
      <CREDAT>YYYYMMDD</CREDAT>
      <CRETIM>HHMMSS</CRETIM>
      <ARCKEY>urn:sap.com:msgid=XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</ARCKEY>
      <SERIAL>YYYYMMDDHHMMSS</SERIAL>
    </EDI_DC40>
    <FLOC_HDR SEGMENT="1">
      <ACTION>X</ACTION>
      <TPLNR>XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</TPLNR>
      <STRNO>XX.XX.XXXX.XXXX.XX-XXX-XXX</STRNO>
      <TPLMA>XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX</TPLMA>
      <TPLMA_L>XX.XX.XXXX.XXXX</TPLMA_L>
      <PLTXT>ITEM DESCRIPTION</PLTXT>
      <EQART>XX-XXXX</EQART>
      <BUKRS>XXXX</BUKRS>
      <IWERK>XXXX</IWERK>
      <SWERK>XXXX</SWERK>
      <EQFNR>XX-XXX-XXX</EQFNR>
      <KOSTL>XXXXXXXXXX</KOSTL>
      <STORT>XX-XXX</STORT>
    </FLOC_HDR>
  </IDOC>
</FLOC01>

entry.title: SAP CI/CPI ProcessDirect Adapter Address
entry.content:
Dear All,

As we use ProcessDirect adapter to modularization our integration flows, I am wondering if there is any way we can trace the URL address that is being generated in the producer or consumer iFlow. I tried the trace option but it is only showing the configured path but not the rendered values in runtime.

entry.title: No values returned (Graphical Mapping SAP CPI)
entry.content:
Good Thursday CPI / Integration fellows,

I am taking an XML test file to simulate the mapping process. However no values are getting taken. When I go to simulate button (top right) I see the data on the source side, however I get the error that no values got procduced for target fields:

entry.title: If returns <null> (Graphical Mapping SAP CPI)
entry.content:
the boolean comparison (equals(String) should return true only if PARVW=RS). If this is the case map NAME2. If false, map empty constant. As the target field NOME has a 1..1 relation, this is needed. 

 

However even if the comparison is true, <null> is returned. What is causing this?

entry.title: queue returns multiple values (Graphical Mapping CPI)
entry.content:
Dear CPI / Integration Fellows,

 

In the following mapping I am trying to get only one value to the target field, as this has the relation 1..1 

 

How can we make this happen? Is my mapping wrong?

entry.title: SAP CPI and Event Mesh Connectivity
entry.content:
We wanted to make a connection between SAP CPI(Neo) and Event Mesh, where we wanted to initialize the flow via scheduler, we just wanted to run our flow connect to Event mesh at specific time but what we observed is if we have to put scheduler in flow then used the request reply and added AMQP adapter but it gives us the error stating that "not compatible" . then we thought of using the rest endpoint via http adapter to consume message from EM queue, but we are getting 401 error statating "HTTP method not found" but it working via postman.

Just wanted to know can we connect CPI and EM via REST or not and is there other way where we can use scheduler and AMQP adapter
